# Product Feasibility Checkpoint

| Mechanism | Depending P0 screens | Verdict | Condition / closest alternative | User decision needed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Detail retrieval and retry | Detail | feasible-with-constraint | Preserve context and expose a retry action when loading fails | No |

The product promise is feasible at planning fidelity. Exact transport, caching, and retry architecture remain later engineering decisions.
